CodeBlockMethod.Name: OnBeginPlay
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
log("hi") self.count = 1 -- "NPCTalk"이라는 이름의 테이블을 가져옵니다. self.npcTalkData = _DataService:GetTable("NPCTalk") log(self.npcTalkData)
-- 엔티티 경로를 통해 UI 요소들을 참조합니다. self.uiNameEntity = _EntityService:GetEntityByPath("/ui/UIGroup/TalkPanel/Name") self.uiMessageEntity = _EntityService:GetEntityByPath("/ui/UIGroup/TalkPanel/Text") self.uiTalkPanel = _EntityService:GetEntityByPath("/ui/UIGroup/TalkPanel") self.uiPortraitEntity = _EntityService:GetEntityByPath("/ui/UIGroup/TalkPanel/Portrait")

CodeBlockMethod.Name: ShowNextText
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
local rowCount = self.npcTalkData:GetRowCount()
if self.count > rowCount then self.uiTalkPanel.Enable = false return end
local isNameEnable = false local isPortraitEnable = false local message = self.npcTalkData:GetCell(self.count, "text") if message == nil then self.uiTalkPanel.Enable = false return else self.uiTalkPanel.Enable = true self.uiMessageEntity.TextComponent.Text = message end local name = self.npcTalkData:GetCell(self.count, "name") local portrait = self.npcTalkData:GetCell(self.count, "portrait") if name ~= "" then isNameEnable = true self.uiNameEntity.TextComponent.Text = name end if portrait ~= "" then isPortraitEnable = true self.uiPortraitEntity.SpriteGUIRendererComponent.ImageRUID = portrait end self.uiNameEntity.Enable = isNameEnable self.uiPortraitEntity.Enable = isPortraitEnable self.count = self.count + 1

CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleKeyDownEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
--Parameters local key = event.key
if key == KeyboardKey.Z then self:ShowNextText() end

CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleTriggerEnterEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
local TriggerBodyEntity = event.TriggerBodyEntity
if TriggerBodyEntity == nil then return end
local playerComponent = TriggerBodyEntity.PlayerComponent
if playerComponent == nil then return end
self:ShowNextText() log("충돌")
